title: Hegseth wants a "High-T" military; doctors call it a clinical minefield
summary: It’s called free testosterone,” Anawalt explained. (A key binding protein for testosterone is called the “sex hormone binding globulin.”) This is critical because some patients may have lab results indicating a low level of total testosterone but still have completely normal levels…
